steps.title: Target the title and award
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the title of a novel that won a Nebula Award. A successful sentence must name the novel and connect that title to the Nebula Award.

steps.title: Reject missing details
steps.content: A does not name a novel or the award. B describes the author but gives no novel title. D says a science fiction novel was published but omits the title and the award. The sentence that names Babel-17 and its Nebula win satisfies the goal. The answer is C.
